title: right where you left me
lyrics: I'm standing right, I'll be standing right here, right where you left me I'll be standing here waiting for the day you are coming back to me I'll be standing right in the place you let me be, where you left me here I can't think no more, it ain't clear, we ain't going nowhere again But I'm still standing right here, still wondering where you, you left to Why'd you go? Oh, why'd you go? I still wanted to know So I'll be right here till you let me know I'm still standing right where you left, you left me I can't believe you can't see what you did to me I'll be standing here, right where you left me, left me I'll be waiting here, right where you left me, left me Cause it makes no sense, all the dark, all the light And it makes no sense that you're in the fight here After all these years, I'll be standing right where you left me You left me You destroy me, you rock me, you hate me, you love me You tic-tac-toe, debate me, then you ace me Now with this new life here, you want to play games, reckless and tasty I can't daze me, they can't phase me None of this bullshit should matter anyways I'm still But right here, where you left me Thinking I'll love something good Thinking I'll love something, something more Than the run of the mill things you throw to the ground So I'm still standing right where you left me I said I'm still standing right where you left me So if you come back around down the block in your mind And you see me standing there, you'll know I've been here the whole time Here the whole time, don't see your eyes at all I'm still standing here I'm still standing here, are you? I'm still standing here, are you? I'm still standing here, are you? I'll be standing in my mind Wait and wait and I wish You could see How far away you come from your own ideals and this Standing right here, right here Standing right here, right here, right I'll be standing here Right here, right here, right here, right here I'm standing right where you left me Where you destroyed me No light, no thought of the way Where you ever come and take my regret away I'm still standing here Right where I let myself lose you

lyricsSegments.text: I'm standing right, I'll be standing right here, right where you left me I'll be standing here waiting for the day you are coming back to me

I'll be standing right in the place you let me be, where you left me here I can't think no more, it ain't clear, we ain't going nowhere again But I'm still standing right here, still wondering where you, you left to
Why'd you go? Oh, why'd you go? I still wanted to know So I'll be right here till you let me know I'm still standing right where you left, you left me I can't believe you can't see what you did to me

I'll be standing here, right where you left me, left me I'll be waiting here, right where you left me, left me Cause it makes no sense, all the dark, all the light And it makes no sense that you're in the fight here After all these years, I'll be standing right where you left me

You left me You destroy me, you rock me, you hate me, you love me You tic-tac-toe, debate me, then you ace me Now with this new life here, you want to play games, reckless and tasty I can't daze me, they can't phase me None of this bullshit should matter anyways I'm still

But right here, where you left me Thinking I'll love something good Thinking I'll love something, something more Than the run of the mill things you throw to the ground So I'm still standing right where you left me

I said I'm still standing right where you left me So if you come back around down the block in your mind And you see me standing there, you'll know I've been here the whole time Here the whole time, don't see your eyes at all
I'm still standing here I'm still standing here, are you? I'm still standing here, are you? I'm still standing here, are you? I'll be standing in my mind
Wait and wait and I wish You could see How far away you come from your own ideals and this
Standing right here, right here Standing right here, right here, right
I'll be standing here Right here, right here, right here, right here
I'm standing right where you left me Where you destroyed me
No light, no thought of the way Where you ever come and take my regret away
I'm still standing here Right where I let myself lose you
